languages.text: {n}На теле неудачливого {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}агента Золотого Трона{/g} расположилось сразу несколько цветков, буквально вытянувших из него последние соки. Во внутреннем кармане несчастного вы находите чудом уцелевший вокс-писец.{/n}

{n}A cluster of flowers has bloomed across the remains of the unfortunate {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}agent of the Golden Throne{/g}, having literally drained the last of his life-fluids. A miraculously unscathed vox-scribe rests within his inner pocket.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}На теле неудачливого {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}агента Золотого Трона{/g} расположилось сразу несколько цветков, буквально вытянувших из него последние соки. Во внутреннем кармане несчастного вы находите чудом уцелевший вокс-писец.{/n}

{n}A cluster of flowers has bloomed across the remains of the unfortunate {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}agent of the Golden Throne{/g}, having literally drained the last of his life-fluids. A miraculously unscathed vox-scribe rests within his inner pocket.{/n}

{n}A cluster of flowers has bloomed across the remains of the unfortunate {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}agent of the Golden Throne{/g}, having literally drained the last of his life-fluids. A miraculously unscathed vox-scribe rests within his inner pocket.{/n}

{n}A cluster of flowers has bloomed across the remains of the unfortunate {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}agent of the Golden Throne{/g}, having literally drained the last of his life-fluids. A miraculously unscathed vox-scribe rests within his inner pocket.{/n}

languages.text: {n}一簇花朵在那位不幸的{g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}黄金王座代理人{/g}的遗骸上绽放，吸干了他最后一滴生命汁液。他内侧口袋里放着的音阵通讯器竟奇迹般地完好无损。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A cluster of flowers has bloomed across the remains of the unfortunate {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}agent of the Golden Throne{/g}, having literally drained the last of his life-fluids. A miraculously unscathed vox-scribe rests within his inner pocket.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}一簇花朵在那位不幸的{g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}黄金王座代理人{/g}的遗骸上绽放，吸干了他最后一滴生命汁液。他内侧口袋里放着的音阵通讯器竟奇迹般地完好无损。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Bir çiçek kümesi, talihsiz {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Altın Taht ajanının{/g} kalıntıları üzerinde açıp kelimenin tam anlamıyla onun son yaşam sıvılarını emmiş. İç cebinde ise mucizevi şekilde zarar görmemiş bir voks kâtibi duruyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A cluster of flowers has bloomed across the remains of the unfortunate {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}agent of the Golden Throne{/g}, having literally drained the last of his life-fluids. A miraculously unscathed vox-scribe rests within his inner pocket.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Bir çiçek kümesi, talihsiz {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Altın Taht ajanının{/g} kalıntıları üzerinde açıp kelimenin tam anlamıyla onun son yaşam sıvılarını emmiş. İç cebinde ise mucizevi şekilde zarar görmemiş bir voks kâtibi duruyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Des fleurs ont poussé sur la dépouille du malheureux {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}agent du Trône d'Or{/g}, en absorbant ce qui restait de ses fluides corporels. Dans sa poche intérieure, vous trouvez un scribe-vox miraculeusement intact.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A cluster of flowers has bloomed across the remains of the unfortunate {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}agent of the Golden Throne{/g}, having literally drained the last of his life-fluids. A miraculously unscathed vox-scribe rests within his inner pocket.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Des fleurs ont poussé sur la dépouille du malheureux {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}agent du Trône d'Or{/g}, en absorbant ce qui restait de ses fluides corporels. Dans sa poche intérieure, vous trouvez un scribe-vox miraculeusement intact.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Un puñado de flores ha brotado en los restos del desdichado {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}agente del Trono Dorado{/g}, habiendo absorbido sus últimos fluidos vitales. Un vocoescriba, milagrosamente intacto, sigue en su bolsillo interior.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A cluster of flowers has bloomed across the remains of the unfortunate {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}agent of the Golden Throne{/g}, having literally drained the last of his life-fluids. A miraculously unscathed vox-scribe rests within his inner pocket.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Un puñado de flores ha brotado en los restos del desdichado {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}agente del Trono Dorado{/g}, habiendo absorbido sus últimos fluidos vitales. Un vocoescriba, milagrosamente intacto, sigue en su bolsillo interior.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Auf den Überresten des glücklosen {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Agenten des Goldenen Throns{/g}, aus dem sämtliche Lebenssäfte gewichen sind, blühen einige Blumen. In seiner Innentasche findest du einen erstaunlich unversehrten Voxschreiber.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A cluster of flowers has bloomed across the remains of the unfortunate {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}agent of the Golden Throne{/g}, having literally drained the last of his life-fluids. A miraculously unscathed vox-scribe rests within his inner pocket.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Auf den Überresten des glücklosen {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Agenten des Goldenen Throns{/g}, aus dem sämtliche Lebenssäfte gewichen sind, blühen einige Blumen. In seiner Innentasche findest du einen erstaunlich unversehrten Voxschreiber.{/n}

languages.text: {n}一群の花が、その不運な{g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}黄金の玉座の工作員{/g}の亡骸の上に咲き乱れ、文字どおり、彼の最後の体液までも吸い尽くしていた。奇跡的に無傷のヴォックス・スクライブが、その内ポケットに収まっている。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A cluster of flowers has bloomed across the remains of the unfortunate {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}agent of the Golden Throne{/g}, having literally drained the last of his life-fluids. A miraculously unscathed vox-scribe rests within his inner pocket.{/n}
